title: How to Report a Phishing or Suspicious Email
text:
Q: What should I do if I receive a phishing or suspicious email?
A: Step 1: Do not click on any links or download any attachments in the email. Step 2: Open your email client. Step 3: Locate the suspicious email in your inbox. Step 4: For Windows users, right-click on the email and select 'Report Phishing' or 'Junk'. For macOS users, click on the email to open it, then go to the 'Message' menu and select 'Mark as Junk' or 'Report Phishing'. Step 5: If your email client does not have a built-in reporting feature, forward the email to the IT helpdesk at helpdesk@company.com. Step 6: Include a brief description of why you believe the email is suspicious. Step 7: Delete the email from your inbox after reporting it. Step 8: If you have already clicked on any links or provided personal information, please contact the IT helpdesk immediately for further assistance.
